design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → architecture=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, source-card-dossier], GSAP=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: hero=Attention, proof+bento=Interest, workflow+media=Desire, CTA band=Action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk only. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline to 2–3 lines at 1120px max-width. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded ScrollTrigger + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, white secondary CTA, all labels verified.
headline: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

site_brief.audience: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies AI assistant
local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

summary: A premium, operator‑grade landing page showing how Super acts as a personal AI agent for local service businesses—handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies by operating real software, reusing a computer-use cache, and turning repetitive office work into durable workflows.
